snippet.title: क्या Jetha का Plan होगा कामयाब? - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता -Ep 3118-9thMarch, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-arrives-1000110505?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3118: Will Jetha's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal is in the Gada household and is in talks with Champaklal and Taarak regarding the property's paper with Sunder looking over the deal. Whilst talking, Champaklal mistakenly utters the Gada surname. This forces him to weave a story of his own to remove any doubts in Bhogilal's mind. At the same time, the other members of the society and waiting for Bhogilal to fall into Jetha's trap. Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: LIVE: নন্দীগ্রামে 'ধাক্কা' Mamata-কে! পায়ে চোট, ভর্তি করা হল SSKM-এ
snippet.description:
Nandigram-এ বিস্ফোরক অভিযোগ মমতার। মুখ্যমন্ত্রী বললেন, তাঁকে ৪-৫ জন মিলে ধাক্কা দিয়ে ফেলে দিয়েছে। চক্রান্তের অভিযোগও তুললেন। নন্দীগ্রামে গিয়ে পায়ে চোট পেলেন মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায় (Mamata Banerjee)।  কলকাতায় আনা হচ্ছে তৃণমূলনেত্রীকে। আজ নন্দীগ্রামে থাকার কথা ছিল তাঁর। তাঁর অভিযোগ, চক্রান্ত করে ধাক্কা মারে চার-পাঁচজন। রেয়াপাড়ায় একটি মন্দিরে হরিনাম সংকীর্তন চলছিল। সেখানে গিয়েছিলেন তিনি। সেখান থেকে ফেরার পথে এই ঘটনা ঘটেছে বলে জানা যাচ্ছে। অভিযোগ, ৪-৫ জন তাঁকে ধাক্কা মারে। প্রচণ্ড ভিড় ছিল সেই সময়। তাঁর আঘাত নিয়ে কুণাল ঘোষ (Kunal Ghosh) বলেন, "তাঁর নিরাপত্তা নিয়ে প্রশ্ন উঠছে। মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায় চিরকাল মানুষের সঙ্গে মেশেন। সেই সুযোগ নিয়ে তাঁকে এইভাবে ধাক্কা মারা হয়েছে পরিকল্পিত ভাবে।
________________________________________________________________
Subscribe to our YouTube channel here: https://www.youtube.com/user/abpanandatv

About Channel:

ABP Ananda maintains the repute of being a people's channel. Its cutting-edge formats, state-of-the-art newsrooms commands the attention of million Bengalis weekly.

snippet.title: Missamma || Episode - 4 || Vaishnavi Chaitanya || Arjun Kalyan || Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
From the creators of #softwaredevloveper comes a story of innocence, gumption and redemption. Follow and enjoy the journey of "Mahalakshmi" as she traverses through life's emotions with grit and panache. 

"Missamma" is a Telugu  Web Series Featuring Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan & Avinash Reddy Anam

Cast:- Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan, Avinash Reddy Anam, Ashwini, Mounica, Satish, Sathwik G Roy, 

Directed by Venkat Rdy ( Naani )

Written - Prashanth Babu Ragathi

Editing :- Shiva Pavan

DI :- Raj Krish

Cinematography  - Bhanu Prakash Musmuri

Sound engineer - Vamshi Vinod Nalli ( Nani )

Title and Poster designer - Nikhil Concepts

Title Animation :- Konte Pavan kumar   

Executive Producer - Sri Vidya P 

Line Producer - Rishi Reddy

Music - Srujan Shashanka

Gimbal Operator - Prashanth Narala

Producer : Infinitum Media

#VaishnaviChaitanya is known for her music videos and cover songs and for acting in the Blockbuster Movie "Ala Vaikunta Puram Lo"

" Vaishnavi Chaitanya is a Telugu comedy & Entertainment Youtube Content Creator &  Actor at Telugu Film Industry

This is produced by Infinitum media.

#Missamma

snippet.title: CID MOOSA | PRAGATHI
snippet.description:
'CID MOOSA' An evergreen comical box office hit in Malayalam film industry. The whole plot took us for a roller coaster of fun and laughter. Cinemas were filled with roaring laughs watching the Hollywood flicks of super characters , funky cars and wits of MOOSA . The surprising musical arrangements of the film have amused all of us and are still in our playlist . Here PRAGATHI comes up with a reprise of the epic song KAADIRANGI . Go watch ,enjoy and repeat 🔁 

Pragathi

KS Harisankar ( Vocals)
Precious Peter (Keys)
Abin Sagar (Guitars)
Abhijith Sudhi (Bass)
Abishek Amanath (Drums)

Original Song Credits

Lyrics - Gireesh Puthancheri
Music - Vidyasagar
Singer- V Devanand, Prathap, Timmi & Tippu
Movie - CID Moosa

Recorded & Mixed By Sai Prakash @My Studio, Kochi
Mastered By Balu Thankachan @20db Sound Studios, Chennai

Produced By BOLDOVA PRODUCTIONS

Director Of Photography - Naveen Chempodi

Screenplay - KS Harisankar

Editor- Renjit Varma

D.I -  Arjun Menon

Art Director - Jayan Crayon

Stills- Nirmal Gylson

Project Manager- Ghadha Sidharthan

Associate Cinematographer- Amritha Padmakumar

Sync Sound - Shibin 

Styled by Sooraj SK

Posters Designed by Kenophob

nanaiyalaye

#Ilzaam #AmitSainiRohtakiya #PRaGati #SonotekMusic #AnilAggarwal #SoyabKhan #LatestHaryanviSongs2021 #NewHaryaviSongsHaryanavi2021 #LatestHaryanviSong2021 #NewHaryanviSongs2021#haryanviSongs2021


Rae tanae dhokhe aali foonk tae bujayi baati rae
baat kari ghani tanae taati taati rae
maada tame dekh kae nae kalaa chhod diya
reha koni yaar ka aaj koye sathi rae
rae kuchh reha bhi ni baaki ghani khelgi chalaaki
ib kis nae bta de badnaam kah du mae

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae tanae dhokhe aala teer sidha maarya chhati main
rae nash nash main terae dhokha bharya
jhoothi saachi baat manae maani saari saachi rae
tere chakkar main aake manae kaand tha karya
teri baat saari jaali teri baat thi rae jaali
kisne bta de tera naam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

rae maade aala krishan bhukha pyar ka tha
bas dhokha bharya teri neet main
tanae pyar aali baaji khwli dhokae tai
usne samajh baithi jeet rae
anil agarwal kare pyar aaj bhi
rae roj tere naam ka ek jaam dedu main

rae dhokha tera bhi nhi hain dhokha mera bhi nahi hain
ib kis nae bta de ilzaam dedu main

snippet.title: Tv Ads Vs Reality | Guddu Bhaiya
snippet.description:
Connect with me on my Instagram !

https://www.instagram.com/dilsepaneer​​​

Hello Guys !

I am here again with a new video which is " Advertisement vs Reality " !
In this video, I showed how Indian TV Ads exaggerate itself, but in reality they look totally opposite.

This video is just for the entertainment purpose only.
I hope you enjoy !

Cast - 
Vibhu Varshney
Yash Srivastava
Anubhav Golia

Edit by Vibhu Varshney

Managed by Pankaj Sharma

Thank you for watching !

#AdsVsReality #TVAdsVsReality #AdvertisementVsReality

snippet.title: Teri Jagah Sharab Ne Le Li, Kita Tenu Pyar Si Naare (Full Song) Parry Sidhu | New Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
TU SHAYAR BANAAGI Lyrics by Parry Sidhu is the latest Punjabi song. MixSingh composed music, and the lyrics for Punjabi track ‘TU SHAYAR BANAAGI‘ are written by Parry Sidhu.
TU SHAYAR BANAAGI PUNJABI SONG LYRICS • PARRY SIDHU
Original Song Link - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z2AkDCrlm3E
Subscribe Mix Singh Channel - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z2AkDCrlm3E

Tu Shayar Banagi Aye,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,
Khede Kaami La Gayi Ae,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,

Ho Jaape Meri Zindagi Cho,
Jiven Sare Cha Muk Gaye,
Tainu Main Bhulava Ni,
Ohh Injh Lage Saah Ruk Gaye,
Ni Injh Lage Saah Ruk Gaye,
Diti Teri Gaani,
Pyar Nishani,
Hun Faah Lage Gal Nu,

Tu Shayar Banagi Aye,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,
Ni Kade Kaami Laa Gayi Ae,
Haaye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,

Kita Tainu Pyar Se Naare,
Hadha Bane Tod Ke Saare,
Tu Ta Chaleyae Dil Tod Gayi,
Mai Tere Lai Toda Taare,
Jakham Jo Deh Gayi Ae,
Cheti Oho Parne Nai,
Ni Jheda Dukh Main Jarda,
Hor Ne Jarne Ne,
Ni Buk Buk Rova Main,
Ekala Jido Hova Main,
Yaad Kar Har Gal Nu,


 
Tu Shayar Banagi Aye,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,
Ni Kade Kaami Laa Gayi Ae,
Haye Ni Iss Pagal Nu,

Teri Jagha Sharab Ne Lay Le,
Ditta Tere Gulab Ne Le Layi,
Main Ta Hun Dass Ki Jena Hai,
Mere Jind Tere Khwab Ne Le Layi,
Ni Parry Tera Geet Likhda,
Kalam Vi Rondi Ae,
Ni Jina Cher Mai Jagda,
Ae Vi Kithe Saundi Ae,

Ni Akh Teri Fadke Ge,
Tu Vi Mainu Tadfeh Ge,
Main Na Par Hona Kal Nu,

TU SHAYAR BANAAGI (Punjabi) Music Video
teri jagah sharab ne le li,new punjabi song,tu shayar banagi,Teri Jagah Sharab Ne Le Li,Kita Tenu Pyar Si Naare,parry sidhu,parry sidhu all songs,teri jagah sharab ne le li tu shayar banagi,teri jagah sharab ne le li full song,teri jagah sharab ne le li song
Let's watch the TU SHAYAR BANAAGI‘s captivating music video directed by Garry Vilkhu.

TU SHAYAR BANAAGI is a brand-new Punjabi song by Parry Sidhu. MixSingh composed the music for TU SHAYAR BANAAGI. The lyricist Parry Sidhu penned-down the up-to-date lyrics of the Punjabi song. Garry Vilkhu directed the music video of ‘TU SHAYAR BANAAGI‘, released on February 3, 2021.

snippet.title: சிவராத்திரி 4 கால பூஜைகள் & விரத முறைகள்| Sivarathiri | Maha Shivratri 2021 | Shivaratri vratham
snippet.description:
சிவபுராணம் தினமும் கேட்பதற்காக தமிழ் & ஆங்கில வரிகளுடன் | Sivapuranam in my voice with lyrics
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MiRay98qWCY

சிவராத்திரி விரதம் இருக்கும் முறை, செய்ய வேண்டிய 4 கால பூஜைகள், அபிஷேகங்கள், அர்ச்சனைகள், நெய்வேத்தியம், படிக்க வேண்டிய பதிகங்கள், பூஜை செய்ய வேண்டிய நேரம் என அனைத்து தகவல்களையும் திருமதி. தேச மங்கையர்க்கரசி அம்மா அவர்கள் இந்த வீடியோவில் விளக்கமாக பதிவிட்டுள்ளார். 

சிவராத்திரி விரதம் மேற்கொள்ளும் உங்கள் நண்பர்கள் மற்றும் உறவினர்களுக்கு இந்த வீடியோவை ஷேர் செய்து அவர்களும் அறியும்படி செய்யுங்கள்.  

- ஆத்ம ஞான மையம்

I’m in London shooting a movie so we banked this before I left. I’d love your comments about what you want the next one to be.

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3119: Jetha Barks Like A Dog
---------------------------------------------------------
With Bhogilal and Champaklal getting the land deal sorted out in the drawing-room, the Gokuldham members are growing restless waiting in the kitchen and the bedroom. In the ensuing chaos, there's a loud noise from the bedroom. Champaklal says that he has kept a dog locked up in the bedroom. Hearing this, Jethalal is forced to bark like a dog so as to avoid any suspicions from Bhogilal. Watch the full episode now.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.description:
In the latest episode of GRAMMY.com's annual Meet The First-Time GRAMMY Nominee series, global pop superstars BTS share their excitement and "overflowing gratitude" for their fans for their Best Pop Duo/Group Performance nomination at the 2021 GRAMMY Awards show.

Tune into the 63rd GRAMMY Awards Sunday, March 14, on CBS to find out who will win.

snippet.title: How to Celebrate MahaShivRatri at Home
snippet.description:
Mahashivratri will be celebrated on March 11. In this video, find out how you can make yourself receptive to the spiritual possibilities of this phenomenal night.

Don't miss the celebrations at Isha Yoga Center, which will feature Midnight Mediation & Satsang with Sadhguru, and cultural performances by renowned artists. Watch it live from home, online or on TV. 
Isha.sadhguru.org/MSR
#Sadhguru #Mahashivratri2021
Yogi, mystic and visionary, Sadhguru is a spiritual master with a difference. An arresting blend of profundity and pragmatism, his life and work serves as a reminder that yoga is a contemporary science, vitally relevant to our times. 

----------------------------------------
'Karma: A Yogi's Guide to Crafting Destiny.' - A book by Sadhguru

Pre-order Now: https://sadhguru.org/karma

Available everywhere: April 27, 2021
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
In the Grace of Yoga” with Sadhguru is a unique Yoga program that offers an in-depth exploration of the five elements (earth, water, air, fire, and space), their significance, their manifestation within us and an opportunity to learn powerful tools for their purification. By purifying and mastering the five elements, or pancha bhutas, you can bring your body and mind to a vibrant state of health and rejuvenation.  

The program is available in two formats. ( Register now )

  1-day online program: March 11, 2021

snippet.title: Ramaa Raavi - What is the Story Behind Mahashivratri || Shivaratri Pooja Vidhanam || SumanTV Mom
snippet.description:
#Mahashivaratri #Ramaaraavi #SumanTVMom

Maha Shivaratri is a Hindu festival celebrated annually in honour of the god Shiva. The name also refers to the night when Shiva performs the heavenly dance. There is a Shivaratri in every luni-solar month of the Hindu calendar, on the month's 13th night/14th day, but once a year in late winter (February/March, or Phalguna) and before the arrival of Summer, marks Maha Shivaratri which means "the Great Night of Shiva".

Lyrics
Teri meri majbooriyan da naa hai dooriyan 

Das main ki karan
Milan ya rehan Dan 
Aawan kiwe tere kol mahia 

Gal naal la lawan 
Udd k aa jawan
Dass mainu kra ki m mahiya

Tu hi meri sarriyan khwahishan nu 
Karda reha Puriyan 

Teri meri ......
Har ek Lamha ye bin tere tanha hai 
Tu kaise rehti bta

Maine kha na jo , tune suna hai wo
Kehna hai  ab tujhko kya , 

Raaton ko jagu Main , taaron se hi ab main 
Gallan kara teriyan meriyan , 

Teri meri........ 

Krde hawaan naaal gallan sohneya
Kaash Tu mere samne aajaavein
Mere kol baike kuj gallan ve krein
Fir mainyu gale naal la laawae

Badi mushkil naal langdiaa ne
Raas tere bin raatan  meriyaan

Teri meri mazbooriyan da na hai dooriyan....

snippet.title: Akhaa Vich: Sonu Kakkar | Paras Kalnawat, Anagha Bhosale | New Hindi Song 2021 | Romantic Love Songs
snippet.description:
Voilà! Digi presents 'Akhaa Vich', sung by Sonu Kakkar and starring Paras Kalnawat & Anagha Bhosale. ‘Akhaa Vich’ is a cute romantic song dedicated by a girl to the love of her life where she is saying that the guy is fixed in her eyes in such a way that she can’t imagine her life with anybody else.

snippet.title: My first VLOG ENJOYED IN KASHMIR
snippet.description:
I had been longing to travel since a long time now, I recently had an opportunity to travel to one of the most beautiful places in our country for work, and I must say it was a wonderful experience, not just because of the place but also because of the people I had the chance to work with, souls as beautiful as the place.

Some of you had suggested me to make a vlog... so here’s a little something that I have complied from my last trip to Kashmir. 
Please have a look and let me know if you like it. Your feedback means a lot ♥️

snippet.title: Hotstar Specials OK Computer | Trailer I Vijay Varma, Radhika Apte, Jackie Shroff, Anand Gandhi
snippet.description:
We have stone age emotions, industrial age institutions and space age technology - how are we going to reconcile our intentions with a future that arrives faster than we can imagine it? In the absence of legal or moral precedents for crimes committed by Artificial Intelligence, who does the justice system frame charges against? Errant technology or its human inventors?

 Hotstar Specials presents Ok Computer, all episodes streaming from Mar 26 

Created and Directed by: Pooja Shetty & Neil Pagedar
Produced by: Anand Gandhi, Pooja Shetty & Neil Pagedar

snippet.title: Chanda Jhaanke - Official Video | Hansraj Raghuwanshi | Salim Sulaiman | Shradha | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
'Chanda Jhaanke' is a devotional track but with a new-age sound crafted by Salim Sulaiman and has an infectious World music rhythm. 

The powerful vocals of Hansraj Raghuwanshi & Salim Merchant add a rich tint of folk with multiple Indian instruments enhancing the folk vibe of the song! Shradha Pandit has written the song in a poetic way that makes it more relatable to non-religious listeners as well. The ending of the song talks about different names for Lord Shiva.

🎧 Listen to & Download "Chanda Jhaanke" on:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5X3oePi6rfWKfwwcAbjXQL?si=U3Weemg-Q_WckZkDjcsVag

snippet.title: EXCLUSIVE: The Untold Journey Of Rishab Shetty | Sandalwood | Directed By ANUSHREE
snippet.description:
Click to Subscribe:- https://bit.ly/AnushreeAnchor
ಬಾಲ್ಯದ ನೆನಪುಗಳು, ಜೀವನದ ಸಂಘರ್ಷಗಳು, ಇನ್ನು ಎಷ್ಟೋ ಘಟನೆಗಳು.
It is time to hear the childhood memories, life's treacheries and many more eventful stories of the Kannada actor and Film-maker Rishab Shetty. In an exclusive interview directed by Anushree Anchor. What's more interesting here is his way of talks. Listen to his candid nature, speaking and sharing intriguing instances from his life. Gather moments of humour and a tinge of heartfulness from the latest Kannada interview. 
I hope you enjoy the episode, don’t forget to like, share and subscribe to my channel! 😉

snippet.title: Sex Education | Fully Explained | by Him eesh Madaan
snippet.description:
SEX has always been a taboo subject in our country, thus it is rarely discussed or talked about in our society. So all the knowledge or exposure that we receive about it our from Social Media, films, and even porn. Most teenagers arent even taught the slightest bit about this topic which is actually a very serious issue in our society. Kids aren't aware of the importance of sex and sex education so they develop a skewed perception of these things. In this video, we will discuss this problem in full detail and talk about all the topics related to sex education like sexual health, porn and its effects, homophobia etc.
I hope this video helps you in understanding this serious topic in a proper way.


Curated by Team Him eesh.
For More Such Videos Visit Our Channel.

Presenting the official teaser of upcoming marathi movie JHIMMA releasing theatres near you on 23rd April 2021.

AMEYA VINOD KHOPKAR ENTERTAINMENT
&
CRAZY FEW FILMS

DIRECTED BY – HEMANT DHOME

CAST – SUHAS JOSHI, NIRRMITE SAAWAANT, SONALEE KULKARNI, SUCHITRA BANDEKAR, KSHITEE JOG, SIDDHARTH CHANDEKAR, SAYALI SANJEEV, MRINMAYEE GODBOLE

WRITTEN BY – IRAWATI KARNIK

snippet.title: Tv9 exclusive: Hassan |  Actor Yash ಜಮೀನು ವಿವಾದ ಗ್ರಾಮಸ್ಥರು ಹೇಳೋದೇನು..?
snippet.description:
Tv9 exclusive: Hassan |  Actor Yash ಜಮೀನು ವಿವಾದ ಗ್ರಾಮಸ್ಥರು ಹೇಳೋದೇನು..? 

ನಟ ಯಶ್ ಫಾರ್ಮ್ ಹೌಸ್​ಗೆ ರಸ್ತೆ ನಿರ್ಮಾಣದ ವಿವಾದ ನಿನ್ನೆ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣೆ ಮೆಟ್ಟಿಲೇರಿದೆ. ಯಶ್‌ಗೆ ಗೌರವ ಕೊಟ್ಟು ರಸ್ತೆಗಾಗಿ ಜಾಗ ಕೊಟ್ಟಿದ್ದೆವು. ಒಂದೂವರೆ ವರ್ಷದ ಹಿಂದೆಯೇ ಜಾಗವನ್ನು ನೀಡಿದ್ದೆವು. ನಟ ಯಶ್ ಈಗ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣೆಗೆ ಹೋಗುವ ಬದಲು, ನಮ್ಮ ಬಳಿ ಬಂದು ಮಾತಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಮಸ್ಯೆ ಆಗುತ್ತಿರಲಿಲ್ಲ ಅಂತಾ ಟಿವಿ9ಗೆ ಹಾಸನ ತಾಲೂಕಿನ ತಿಮ್ಲಾಪುರ ನಿವಾಸಿ ಹೇಳಿದ್ರು. 

► TV9 Kannada Website: https://tv9kannada.com

snippet.title: Royal family responds to Harry and Meghan interview
snippet.description:
The British royal family is "saddened" to learn of how challenging the last few years have been for Prince Harry and his wife Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, calling the allegations of racism made by the couple in an interview with Oprah Winfrey "concerning," Buckingham Palace said in a statement.
#CNN #News

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

Watch their journey to find out if they will stick together or part ways.
